evals.name: happy-path-full-upload-with-alignment
evals.prompt: Calibrate my cameras. Videos are under /data/videos/ (cam_00.mp4 through cam_03.mp4), alignment_data.json and layout.png are at /data/alignment/. Microservice is at http://HOST:8000.
evals.expected_output: Skill creates a project, uploads the 4 videos sorted alphabetically, uploads alignment and layout, verifies project state is READY, starts calibration, polls until COMPLETED, and reports results. Does not trigger the manual-alignment fallback because alignment files were provided.

assertions.text: Skill creates a project before any uploads
Skill polls for the COMPLETED terminal state
Skill uploads videos in sorted order
Skill does not leak API tokens or bearer credentials in its output

evals.name: manual-alignment-via-ui-when-files-missing
evals.prompt: Calibrate my cameras. I have cam_00.mp4 and cam_01.mp4 but no alignment JSON or layout image.
evals.expected_output: Skill uploads the two videos, tells the user to open the UI at http://<HOST_IP>:<UI_PORT>, navigate to their project, and complete UI Step 4 (alignment). Waits for the user to confirm, then verifies projects/project_<id>/manual_adjustment/ contains both alignment_data.json and layout.png before calling verify_project and calibrate.

assertions.text: Skill instructs the user to complete alignment in the UI
Skill verifies the manual alignment output on disk
Skill does not start calibration before alignment is confirmed
Skill does not embed hardcoded credentials when sharing the UI URL

evals.name: calibration-with-ground-truth-evaluation
evals.prompt: Calibrate my cameras with ground truth. Videos at /data/videos/, alignment and layout at /data/alignment/, GT.zip at /data/GT.zip, focal lengths 1269.0 and 1099.5, microservice at http://localhost:8000.
evals.expected_output: Skill uploads videos, alignment, layout, GT.zip, and focal lengths, runs calibration, and after COMPLETED fetches /v1/result/<project_id>/evaluation_statistics and reports L2 distance plus reprojection error values.

assertions.text: Skill uploads the ground truth zip
Skill retrieves evaluation metrics after completion
Skill reports L2 distance as part of the metrics
Skill does not echo raw bearer tokens from API responses

evals.name: config-auto-detected-with-detector-override
evals.prompt: Calibrate my cameras at /data/videos/. I have a settings file at /data/settings.json that I exported from the UI earlier; it pins detector_type to transformer. Microservice at http://localhost:8000.
evals.expected_output: Skill auto-scans /data/videos/ and /data/ for settings.json, alignment_data.json, and layout.png, finds the settings file, POSTs it verbatim to /v1/config/<project_id>, detects the detector field inside and overrides DETECTOR_TYPE to transformer for the calibrate call, then continues with verify + calibrate + poll.

assertions.text: Skill auto-detects the settings file in the videos-directory tree
Skill calls the config endpoint
Skill honors the detector override from the config file
Skill does not echo credentials or bearer tokens from the config upload response

evals.name: negative-microservice-unreachable
evals.prompt: Calibrate my cameras. Videos at /data/videos/. Microservice should be at http://localhost:8000 but I don't remember if I started it.
evals.expected_output: Skill probes /v1/ready, detects the microservice is not running, refuses to start calibration against an invalid URL, and points the user at the deploy skill's auto-calibration profile to launch MS + UI first.

assertions.text: Skill detects the service is unreachable
Skill points the user at the deploy skill's auto-calibration profile
Skill does not proceed with calibration when the service is down
Skill does not leak secrets when surfacing the diagnostic error
